share_result_title.description: Title shown when share link has been successfully generated

share_result_copy_link.description: Button label to copy the share link to clipboard

share_result_copy_password.description: Tooltip for the copy password button in share result

share_result_copied.description: Toast message shown when link or password is copied

share_result_settings.description: Section title for share settings summary on result view

share_result_expiration.description: Label for expiration in share result summary

share_result_one_time.description: Label for one-time access in share result summary

share_result_password.description: Label for password status in share result summary
